name: StepStone Group Inc.
description: StepStone Group Inc. is a global private markets investment firm that provides customized investment solutions, advisory, and data services to its clients. The firm specializes in primary fund investments, secondary fund investments, and co-investments across various asset classes, including private equity, real estate, infrastructure, and private debt. Founded in 2007 and headquartered in New York, New York, StepStone operates a comprehensive platform designed to help institutional and private wealth investors navigate the complexities of private markets through deep research, data-driven insights, and a global network of investment professionals.
